results.rendered_html:
varīyas a.
1 Better, more excellent, preferable.
2 Most excellent, very good;  Māl. 1. 16. 
3 Larger, wider, more extensive (compar. of uru q. v.).
4 Extremely tender or younger.
— n. Ved. Rest, repose.
